zh.lifeSummary: 當William Banastre II於1359年出生在英國薩默塞特惠亞爾時，他的父親Lord William De Banastre I18歲，母親Sybill de Hoghton14歲。他於1383年與Elizabeth Wellesley在英國英格蘭薩默塞特拉德斯托可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1395年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特福洛享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Banastre II于1359年出生在英国薩默塞特惠亞爾时，他的父亲Lord William De Banastre I18岁，母亲Sybill de Hoghton14岁。他于1383年与Elizabeth Wellesley在英国英格兰薩默塞特拉德斯托可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1395年在英国英格兰薩默塞特福洛享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Banastre II was born in 1359, in Wheathill, Somerset, England, his father, Lord William De Banastre I, was 18 and his mother, Sybill de Hoghton, was 14. He married Elizabeth Wellesley in 1383, in Radstock, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1395, in Frome, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Banastre II est né en 1359, à Wheathill, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Lord William De Banastre I, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Sybill de Hoghton, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Wellesley en 1383, à Radstock, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1395, à Frome, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Banastre II 1359 in Wheathill, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord William De Banastre I 18 und seine Mutter Sybill de Hoghton 14. Er hat 1383 in Radstock, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Wellesley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1395 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Frome, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Banastre II è nato il nel 1359 nel Wheathill, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Lord William De Banastre I, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Sybill de Hoghton, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Wellesley nel 1383, nel Radstock, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1395, nel Frome, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Banastre IIが1359年にイギリスソメルセトウィースイルで生まれた時，父Lord William De Banastre Iは18歳，母Sybill de Hoghtonは14歳であった。1383年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトラドストックでElizabeth Wellesleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1395年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトフロメで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Banastre II(이)가 1359년 영국 서머세트 휘스이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord William De Banastre I(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybill de Hoghton(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1383년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 라드스톡에서 Elizabeth Wellesley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1395년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 프롬에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Banastre II nasceu em 1359, em Wheathill, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord William De Banastre I, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Sybill de Hoghton, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Wellesley em 1383, em Radstock, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1395, em Frome, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Banastre II родился в 1359 г. в местности уитилл, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord William De Banastre I было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybill de Hoghton, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Wellesley в 1383 г. в местности радстокк, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1395 г. в местности фром, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Banastre II nació en 1359, en Wheathill, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord William De Banastre I, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Sybill de Hoghton, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Wellesley en 1383, en Radstock, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1395, en Frome, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 36 años.
